institution.name: Savannah College of Art and Design

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Savannah College of Art and Design fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (59.0% → 51.5%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Savannah College of Art and Design fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Savannah College of Art and Design rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 (12.5k → 15.2k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Savannah College of Art and Design rose 13% between 2006 and 2009 (58.7% → 66.2%).
